steps.title: Identify the forecasting context
steps.content: The phrase “Expecting to see continued growth” indicates analysts have a positive outlook. The blank needs a verb for what analysts do when they make statements about future revenues based on that expectation.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is: making a forward-looking statement based on positive expectations. “Predicted” expresses exactly this — it's how analysts state what will happen when they expect growth.

The others fail: denied and worried contradict the optimistic context, while produced doesn't work syntactically with “that” + clause.

D is correct.
